shortDescription: Spacious 2-bedroom condo in Church-Yonge Corridor with open layout, balcony, and underground parking.
fullDescription: Welcome to 11 Wellesley Street West, Unit 1601 in the vibrant Church-Yonge Corridor neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area showcases original architectural details alongside tasteful modern updates. The kitchen has been fully renovated with soft-close cabinetry, stone counters, and a breakfast bar. Upstairs, 2 bright bedrooms include a primary retreat with ensuite and double closets. A private outdoor space — perfect for morning coffee or summer entertaining — completes the package. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Close to waterfront trails and cycling paths
Open kitchen with waterfall island and pot lights
Fenced yard ideal for children and pets
